mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.created_at AS createdAt, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.company_name AS companyName, s.opening_date AS openingDate, s.zonecode, s.address1, s.address2,
-- 🎯 [우주 치트키] 가게 사진 파일명들을 콤마(,)로 묶어서 하나의 문자열로 뽑아내네! -- 결과 예시: "uuid1.png,uuid2.png" GROUP_CONCAT(f.sysname ORDER BY f.files_seq ASC) AS storeSysNames
FROM users u LEFT JOIN stores s ON u.user_seq = s.user_seq LEFT JOIN files f ON u.user_seq = f.user_seq AND f.file_category = 'STORE_IMAGE' WHERE u.user_seq = #{user_seq} AND u.user_type = 'PARTNER' -- 💡 GROUP_CONCAT을 쓰려면 유저 기준으로 묶어줘야 하네! GROUP BY u.user_seq, s.biz_number
